# OpenTerms Registry Seed

**511 openterms.json files** covering the most widely-used internet services — machine-readable terms-of-service permissions generated by the [OpenTerms.com](https://openterms.com) registry pipeline.

---

## What's in this archive

| Path | Contents | Count |
|------|----------|-------|
| `validated/` | Machine-validated openterms.json files (high confidence) | 53 |
| `unvalidated/` | Machine-generated files (pending validation) | 458 |
| `flagged/` | Files with data quality issues (needs review) | 0 |
| `index.json` | Machine-readable manifest of all entries | 511 entries |

## Stats

- **Total entries**: 511
- **Validated**: 53
- **Unvalidated**: 458
- **Flagged**: 0
- **Generated**: 2026-04-16

## Schema

Each file follows the [openterms.json v0.3.1 specification](https://openterms.com/spec).

## Usage

### Python SDK

```python
from openterms import OpenTermsClient
client = OpenTermsClient()
status = client.check("github.com", "train_ai")
print(status)  # {"allowed": False, "confidence": 0.95}
```

Install: `pip install openterms`

### Direct API

```bash
curl https://openterms.com/registry/github-com/status
```
